notableEvents.label: Dane Myers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers grounds into a double play, second baseman Edouard Julien to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman Troy Johnston. Ke'Bryan Hayes out at 2nd. Dane Myers out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Hunter Goodman grounds into a double play, shortstop Elly De La Cruz to second baseman Matt McLain to first baseman Sal Stewart. Mickey Moniak out at 2nd. Hunter Goodman out at 1st.
